payload.summary: Node.js module not found error fix using cross-platform path resolution with path.join(), fs.existsSync(), and error handling
strategy: Identify root cause: hardcoded paths, missing file, or incorrect path resolution
Replace absolute paths with cross-platform path.join(__dirname, 'filename.js')
Add fs.existsSync() check before require to provide clear error messages
Wrap require in try-catch with detailed logging (cwd, __dirname, resolved path)
Test on multiple platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux)
Validate path resolution before module loading
preconditions: Node.js module not found error detected
Hardcoded Windows paths in require statements
